characters.name: Amber Klein
characters.description: Amber KleinCharacter nameAmber KleinGenderFemaleFamilyUnnamed fatherMarsha Klein(mother)Bornc. 1980EnglandFirstBeginningsLastLeavesCount8ActorTheo ParkJessica Hynes(voice) Amber Kleinis aminor characterfeatured inSpaced. She is the teenage daughter ofMarsha Klein, the landlady ofMeteor Street, who refers to her, amongst other things, as the "Duchess of the D grade" and "The Devil in an A-Cup". Amber and Marsha often have screaming matches ending with Amber storming out of the house. InChangeshe finally moves out.

characters.name: Bilbo Bagshot
characters.description: Bilbo BagshotCharacter nameBilbo BagshotOccupationManager atFantasy BazaarGenderMaleBornc. 1960EnglandFirstBeginningsLastChangeCount3ActorBill Bailey Bilbo Bagshotis aminor characterfeatured inSpaced. Bilbo is a fan of comic books. His favourite film is "Hawk the Slayer" and he has been known to turn violent if it's insulted, once punching his own father in the face. He is the manager ofFantasy Bazaar, a comic book store, where he employsTimas his assistant manager.

characters.name: Brian Topp
characters.description: Brian ToppCharacter nameBrian ToppOccupationConceptual artistGenderMaleFamilyUnnamed fatherUnnamed motherKevin(uncle; deceased)NicknameBriClubbing AliasBrian Can'tRescue AliasChewieBornc. 1960EnglandFirst"Beginnings"Last"Leaves"Count14ActorMark Heap Brian Toppis amain characterfeatured inSpaced. He is an eccentric artist who works with (in his own words, accompanied by an amusing visual) "anger, pain, fear [and] aggression". Brian was born c. 1960 in England, the son of parents who remain unnamed throughout the series. As a child, Brian showed a great interest and skill in the visual arts. When his mother visits in"Help"(incidentally, the only parent of the characters who appears on-screen), it is mentioned that Brian was never very close to his father as they never had anything to connect over. After moving away from his parents and into theMeteor Streetflat, he began to lie and tell his parents that he was actually a lawyer.

characters.name: Characters
characters.description: CharactersinSpacedinclude the main characters who make an appearance in every episode as well as those who only make recurring, brief, or single appearances.

characters.name: Colin
characters.description: ColinCharacter nameColinGenderMaleFamilyDaisy Steiner(owner)Tim Bisley(owner)Bornc. 1997EnglandFirstBattlesLastLeavesCount10ActorAda Colinis asecondary characterfeatured inSpaced. He isDaisyandTim'spet dog. Colin is aMiniature Schnauzerthat was purchased from the dog pound by Daisy. He was shortly going to be put down as dogs could only stay at the shelter awaiting adoption for a limited time. His life before his incarceration in the dog pound is unknown. He was named after Daisy's childhood pet cardboard box.

characters.description: Daisy SteinerCharacter nameDaisy SteinerOccupationWriterKitchen AssistantBookstore AssistantGenderFemaleFamilyBen Steiner(father)Emily Steiner(mother)Unnamed older brotherUnnamed younger sisterSamantha Steiner(aunt; deceased)"Luke" Bisley(daughter)NicknameDaizDaisy Duke (Richard)PickleDizzy SteinwayClubbing AliasHappy DaizRescue AliasLeiaBorn1975Richmond, London, EnglandFirst"Beginnings"Last"Leaves"Count14ActorJessica Hynes Daisy Ann Steineris amain characterfeatured inSpaced Daisy is the daughter ofBenandEmily Steiner. She graduated from Kingston 'Poly-University!' with a third in Humanities in 1996.

characters.name: Damien Knox
characters.description: Damien KnoxCharacter nameDamien KnoxOccupationManager atDark Star ComicsGenderMaleFirst"Help"Last"Change"Count3ActorClive RussellDamien Knoxis the head ofDark Star Comics, the company thatTimdesperately longed to work for. When Tim first submitted his portfolio, Damien laughed him out of the office. Tim had since been haunted by visions of Damien laughing at him. During this time, Damian is parodied by Tim in his artwork proclaiming "I'm a massive wanker". Damian is shown to be considering "new blood" at Dark Star, whereuponSophiesuggested that he re-examine Tim's work. Tim got the call to re-submit his portfolio and hastily removed the offensive picture of Damian; however,Daisyinadvertently replaced it. Luckily for Tim, Sophie removed it before Damian could see it.

characters.description: Emily SteinerCharacter nameEmily SteinerGenderFemaleFamilyDaisy Steiner(daughter)Ben Steiner(husband)Samantha Steiner(sister-in-law)Appeared inDissolution(voice only) Emily Steineris acharacterfeatured inSpaced. Her voice was provided by Sally Grace. She does not appear in person. Emily is the mother ofDaisyand the wife ofBen Steiner. She is also the sister-in-law ofSamantha Steiner.

characters.name: Hoover
characters.description: HooverCharacter nameHooverOccupationPerformance ArtistGenderMaleAppeared in"Art"Count1ActorPaul KayeHooveris a minor character fromSpaced. His real name is unknown. He appears in the episode"Art"asVulva's performance partner. He is foul mouthed and unpleasant, as evidenced whenDaisytries to strike up a conversation with him after the show. He carries a hoover around with him and tinkers with it (or pretends to) using a screwdriver.

characters.name: James Eldridge
characters.description: James Eldridge is a freelance vivisectionist who runs an illegal laboratory in North London. In the episodeChaoshe stalks and kidnapsColinthe dog. After Colin's rescue by Tim and Daisy, Eldridge goes on the run with £250,000 after his lab is found by the police and shut down. He is last seen near Hempstead Heath being attacked by (presumably)Gramsci.

characters.name: Minty
characters.description: Minty was a homeless proponent of Socialism, and owner ofGramsci. According to Bilbo, Minty was "into the whole Class War thing" and made a living by selling the Socialist Worker magazine. He also trained Gramsci to attack rich people, claiming the dog could smell wealth up to 20 feet away. One day Minty won £100,000 on a lottery scratchcard, and Gramsci immediately turned on him and bit his knees off. Minty used the money to buy new knees, while Gramsci fled.

characters.name: Richard
characters.description: RichardCharacter nameRichardOccupationStudentGenderMaleNicknameBoss Hog (Daisy)First"Beginnings"Last"Battles"Count3ActorJames Lance RichardisDaisy's long-distance boyfriend for part of the first season. He is portrayed by James Lance. He is away studying in Hull, though Daisy never visits him and he never comes out to see her. In the episodeBattles, Richard calls Daisy and breaks off their relationship, indirectly influencing her to get her dog,Colin.

characters.name: Sarah
characters.description: SarahCharacter nameSarahGenderFemaleFirst"Beginnings"Last"Ends"Count4ActorAnna Wilson-Jones SarahisTim's ex-girlfriend. She is portrayed by Anna Wilson-Jones. Sarahwas Tim's girlfriend for five years until she dumped him for her boss,Duane, in effect sparking off Tim's meeting (and eventual relationship with)Daisy.

characters.name: Sophie
characters.description: SophieCharacter nameSophieOccupationAssistant atDark Star ComicsGenderFemaleFirst"Help"Last"Leaves"Count4ActorLucy Akhurst SophieisDamien's alluring assistant atDark Star Comics. She is portrayed by Lucy Akhurst. She helpedTimget hired at Dark Star, first by suggesting Damien re-examine Tim's portfolio and then by removing the derogatory picture of Damien thatDaisyhad accidentally enclosed within it. Whilst doing so, she discovered a picture that Tim had drawn of her, suggesting that he found her attractive.

characters.name: Tim Bisley
characters.description: Tim BisleyCharacter nameTimothy BisleyOccupationGraphic artist atDark Star ComicsAssistant Manager atFantasy BazaarGenderMaleFamilyJohn Bisley(father)Gillian Bisley(mother)Kate Bisley(sister)"Luke" Bisley(daughter)NicknameTimTim-TimTimmyClubbing AliasTimothy B.Rescue AliasHanBorn17 September 1974Highgate, North LondonEnglandFirst"Beginnings"Last"Leaves"Count14ActorSimon Pegg Timothy Bisleyis amain characterfeatured inSpaced Tim is the son ofJohnandGillian Bisley, and the older brother ofKatie Bisley. He was born 17 September 1974 in Highgate, North London, England. He has been best friends withMike Wattsince childhood. Mike wishes desperately that he could join the British Army, but unfortunately is ineligible owing to thedetached retinashe received following a painful childhood accident when jumping from a tree after being egged on by Tim. This accident made him unable to enlist. Tim was formerly in a relationship with Sarah, but she left him forDuane Benzie, Tim's friend. He has suffered extreme emotional damage from this, including paranoia and mood swings.

Twist is the daughter of parents who remain unnamed throughout the series. She claims that they were hippies, which is why she has an unusual name. She is the best friend ofDaisy Steiner, though nobody is sure why.

characters.name: Yolanda
characters.description: YolandaCharacter nameYolandaOccupationFlapsmagazine editorGenderFemaleAppeared in"Art"Count1ActorClaire RushbrookYolandais the head interviewer atFlaps, a women's magazine thatDaisyapplies for a job with. She is portrayed by Claire Rushbrook. In "Art", Daisy receives a letter inviting her to an interview atFlaps. Tim offers her a pull on a joint before she goes, which turns out to be a mistake. At the interview, Yolanda seems to know the other interviewees on a personal level, which doesn't bode well for Daisy. When Daisy is invited into the interview room, Yolanda explains that their tag for the magazine is"Big, Hard, Now".She launches into a speil about the magazine, which Daisy misses as she tunes out to the sound of the theme to theMagic Roundabout.
